Thanks for sending a pull request! Please fill in the sections below.
Delete sections that don't apply.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing behavior)
- [ ] Docs / build / CI only
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Fixes #123, Related to #456 -->

## How was this tested?

<!--
- [ ] `mvn -B verify` passes locally
- [ ] Added unit tests
- [ ] Added integration tests (fixture-its / plugin-its)
- [ ] Manually verified on a sample project — describe how
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style (run `mvn spotless:apply` if needed)
- [ ] I added tests that cover my change, or explained why none are needed
- [ ] I updated docs (`docs/`, `website/`, or in-code Javadoc) where user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible changes
- [ ] No new warnings or errors introduced

## Anything else reviewers should know

<!-- Tradeoffs, follow-ups, screenshots for UI changes, etc. -->
